text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, now that that race's over, we should
start training for my next goal...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Not sure. Sorry to be so blunt about this, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I feel, I dunno, tied down? I go out there, thinkin'
I'm going to really let loose, but once I'm
running... It's real meh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Soz, I'm probably just tired. Don't worry,
though. I'll hit the sack early tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her recent spate of races must be taking a toll on
her. I think we need to make some changes to her
schedule...
